sections.paragraph:
χιλιάς, άδος, ἡ (χίλιοι; Aeschyl., Hdt.+; LXX; TestSol 26:9 H; TestAbr, TestJob, JosAs; GrBar 4:10) a group of a thousand, a thousand pl. (En 10:17, 19; Jos., Ant. 6, 193) Lk 14:31ab; Ac 4:4; 1 Cor 10:8; Rv 7:4–8; 11:13; 14:1, 3; 21:16; 1 Cl 43:5. χίλιαι χιλιάδες 34:6 (Da 7:10). χιλιάδες χιλιάδων thousands upon thousands Rv 5:11 (χιλιάδων also a loanw. in rabb.). In Rv the noun denoting what is counted may stand in the same case as χιλ. (so Theophanes Conf., Chron. 482, 14 deBoor λ´ χιλιάδες νομίσματα; 7, 17 πολλὰς μυριάδας μάρτυρας) instead of the gen. 7:4, 5a, 8c; 11:13; cp. ἐπὶ σταδίων δώδεκα χιλιάδων 21:16 (ἐπὶ σταδίους δώδεκα χιλιάδων v.l.). The millennium χιλιάδα τινὰ … ἐτῶν ἔσεσθαι Papias (2:12).—DELG s.v. χίλιοι. M-M. TW.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

H H = Hermas; cited, unless otherwise noted, according to MWhittaker; II a.d.—List 1

TestAbr TestAbr = Testament of Abraham, with some interpolations; I b.c./I a.d.—Lists 2, 5

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

GrBar GrBar = Greek Baruch (Apocalypsis Baruchi Graece)—List 2

  1. pl. = plural

En En = I Enoch—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

loanw. loanw. = loanword

rabb. rabb. = rabbinical (literature etc.)

Theophanes Conf Theophanes Conf , VIII–IX a.d.—List 5

gen. gen. = genitive

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1084
